query:
SELECT 
  season,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.mSchedule[0].playoffTierType') as sample_tier_type,
  JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.mSchedule')) as schedule_count
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season IN (2023, 2024, 2025)
LIMIT 10;
